title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails in the Sky the 3rd

title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails in the Sky the 3rd
notes: No movies. Watch them from game folder

Videos don't play, so you have to press a key on startup (black screen) to skip the intro.  After this, it runs perfectly.  Didn't need to tweak anything.

Areas load much faster - some sort of pause/temporary freezing issue that occurred on Windows 7 is gone.  Much more pleasant when going inside lots of houses.  So far I would actually consider it a slight upgrade to running natively.
